sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/nested_frames, read the text inside the middle frame

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Nested Frames Page
workflow.description: Identify the nested frames and read the text from the middle frame.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/nested_frames
actions: Read text from the frame with name 'frame-middle'

workflow.name: Text Read From Middle Frame
workflow.description: The text from the middle frame has been successfully read.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/nested_frames
actions: Terminate: text from middle frame read
